A symbol (for example [[alo]]) is a [[transjective]] [[trajective]] entity that you see the world through<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7bQKJPMXMbM&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=43</ref>

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Symbol]][[Category:Religious objects]]
[[Category:Religious symbols]]
==References==
[[Category:Pages]]
